description_long: This is a classic black and white football with a traditional 32-panel design, featuring alternating pentagonal and hexagonal panels. The surface is made of synthetic leather, with visible stitching along the seams, giving it a slightly textured appearance. One side of the ball displays a logo with a star and stripes above the word 'EARTH', suggesting a possible brand or thematic design. The panels are clean and show minimal signs of wear, indicating the ball is either new or only lightly used. The ball is fully inflated, maintaining a spherical shape, and the stitching appears even and secure. The overall look is professional and suitable for use in parks, playgrounds, or urban sports facilities.
description: A classic black and white football with a 32-panel stitched design and a visible 'EARTH' logo on one side. The ball appears new, with a clean, slightly textured synthetic leather surface.
description_view_0: A front view showing the black and white panel pattern with no visible logos or text.
description_view_1: This view highlights the 'EARTH' logo and star-striped emblem on a white panel, distinguishing it from other sides.
description_view_2: A clean view of the panel pattern, similar to view 0, with no visible branding or text.
description_view_3: Another angle of the classic panel design, showing only the stitched panels without any logos.
